name: 갑수
visual_description: An elderly Korean man in his 60s. He wears a faded, old undershirt covered by a neatly ironed but worn mailman vest. His face is etched with worry and a deep longing. He has trembling hands. His hair is likely thinning and graying.
consistency_prompt: Elderly Korean man, mailman vest, worried expression, trembling hands, sitting at a table with chopsticks and danmuji.
